user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the survey notification template list, so that I can confirm the survey notification is configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view the Survey Notification template, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the survey notification templates are listed; When I click View on the Survey Notification row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the survey notification templates list, so that I always see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view for surveys, so that I can manage the email channel as well
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
